relationTypes.name: MEMBER_OF
relationTypes.description: Agent/Human is a member of a Team.

relationTypes.name: OWNS
relationTypes.description: Identity/Human owns an entity.

relationTypes.name: HAS_IDENTITY
relationTypes.description: Agent/Human is bound to an Identity.

relationTypes.name: ASSUMES_IDENTITY
relationTypes.description: Agent assumes/impersonates an Identity at runtime.

relationTypes.name: USES
relationTypes.description: Agent uses a Tool or Skill.

relationTypes.name: INVOKES
relationTypes.description: Runtime-observed invocation of a Tool by an Agent.

relationTypes.name: DEPENDS_ON
relationTypes.description: Dependency between tools/skills/agents.

relationTypes.name: PROVIDES
relationTypes.description: Tool/Runtime provides a Skill or Resource.

relationTypes.name: RUNS_ON
relationTypes.description: Agent runs on a Runtime.

relationTypes.name: DEPLOYED_IN
relationTypes.description: Runtime is deployed in a Workspace.

relationTypes.name: SCOPED_TO
relationTypes.description: Entity is scoped to a Workspace.

relationTypes.name: GOVERNED_BY
relationTypes.description: Subject is governed by a Policy.

relationTypes.name: GRANTS
relationTypes.description: Policy grants access to a Resource.

relationTypes.name: ACCESSES
relationTypes.description: Agent accesses a Resource.

relationTypes.name: TRUSTS
relationTypes.description: Trust edge between agents/identities.

relationTypes.name: DELEGATES_TO
relationTypes.description: Agent delegates a task/authority to another agent.

relationTypes.name: COMMUNICATES_WITH
relationTypes.description: Observed interaction channel between agents.

relationTypes.name: COLLABORATES_WITH
relationTypes.description: Team-to-team collaboration.

relationTypes.name: PRODUCED
relationTypes.description: Agent produced a Trace.

relationTypes.name: EVIDENCED_BY
relationTypes.description: An assertion is evidenced by a Trace.

relationTypes.name: DERIVED_FROM
relationTypes.description: Entity/relation derived/inferred from another.
